title: limonium minutum subsp. escarrei
intro: Limonium minutum subsp. escarrei, also known as dwarf sea lavender, is a plant species within the family Plumbaginaceae, characterized by its small, fragrant flowers and compact growth habit. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Limonium minutum subsp. escarrei include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although its use as a medicinal agent requires further scientific study and validation.
